playbook.intent: 1-hour weekly session: PM brings business priorities, tech lead brings tech-debt + capacity reality. Output: top-of-backlog is spec-ready (acceptance criteria + estimated complexity), nothing else. AI agent splits oversized items into sub-tasks.
playbook.scope: 1-hour weekly session: PM brings business priorities, tech lead brings tech-debt + capacity reality. Output: top-of-backlog is spec-ready (acceptance criteria + estimated complexity), nothing else. AI agent splits oversized items into sub-tasks.

success-criteria.criterion: All 3 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Pre-Read
stage.intent: PM + tech lead both prep before meeting.

tasks.task: PM brings the candidate items with outcomes + value notes
Tech lead reads the candidates and flags feasibility risks
Both pre-agree the top 5 items to discuss

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when both arrive with the pre-read done.

stage.name: Groom Live

tasks.task: Walk top 5; either ready / needs-info / drop
Write acceptance criteria for ready items

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every top-5 item has a ready/needs/drop verdict.

stage.name: Update & Communicate

tasks.task: Update the backlog with the changes from the meeting
Post the grooming summary to the team channel

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a published grooming summary.
